PROCESS RECORD

The Mythos of Aria

Zachary Coak · Novel
Ledger chain intact since May 14, 2026 at 8:41 AM

This is the record of The Mythos of Aria, a novel by Zachary Coak, tracked beginning May 8, 2026. Every working note, every saved version, every reference and source is preserved here in the order it happened.

2
CHECK-INS

VERSIONS

MATERIALS

About this project

Medium · Novel

Description
The Mythos of Aria is an adventure-fantasy novel that follows Alex, a young boy on a journey
to become a knight. During his travels he is transported to and trapped in the fairy realm,
until he is rescued by Elizabeth, who is known as the fairy hunter. Alex becomes invoved in a
guild set on destroying fairy circles that have begun appearing all over the land, and learns
of various conspiricies involving the kingdom he wished to serve.
Intent
The Mythos of Aria started out as a story idea called 'Dark Orb,’ which I developed in middle
school. A few mini comic panels came from this world, but nothing else. Eventually, I started
writing stories revolving around the necromancer from that story, and then developed the
Mythos of Aria as the larger world around it. Duality of the Sword was going to be a new
story altogether and recycle existing Mythos of Aria elements, but development didn’t make
it very far. I plan on outlining the rest of the original Mythos of Aria story, and finally finishing
this story that has been a decade in the making.

Working Notes

2 entries

Working notes recorded by Zachary Coak during the making of The Mythos of Aria. 2 entries between May 8, 2026 and May 14, 2026. These are the author's own words: status reports, breakthroughs, moments of being stuck, decisions made along the way.

May 14, 2026 at 2:22 PM [STUCK]

I need to come up with ideas for act 2 and 3. I started this project so long ago that it’s hard to remember all of the elements I’m working with, and what loose ends I need to tie.

May 8, 2026 at 9:27 PM [WORKING]

The Mythos of Aria is a project I started in 2015, and I have decided to resurrect it. As of now, it is an elleven chapter, nearly 40,000 word long unfinished novel, and the content for it only covers Act 1. I hope to flesh out the world, it’s characters, and most importantly the rest of the story.

References & Materials

14 items

The visual and audio ingredients of the work: sketches, scans, voice memos, reference imagery, retired drafts. The things Zachary Coak looked at and drew from.

📄 2019_TheGastlyGauntlet.docx
Old Draft May 9, 2026

2019_TheGastlyGauntlet

This is an unfinished side story that takes place in the floating islands of Bryna. This location is where Alex is transported to in the non-canonical Duality of the Sword story. This story may be developed further one day.

📄 2016_DualityOfTheSword.docx
Old Draft May 9, 2026

2016_DualityOfTheSword

Duality of the Sword was created sometime after the original Mythos of Aria started, but it's not clear exactly when. The prologue is a scene where a younger Alex sees the blood night elietes parading the dragon Xiuhcoatl's remains through their village. This event is mentioned in chapter 1 of The Mythos of Aria, but here it is given a full scene. Chapter 1 here depicts Alex waking up in the floating islands of Bryna. This place exists within the same fairy realm as the Mythos of Aria, where Alex is also transported, but we don't get to see the start of his journey up to this point. I think I wanted to redo the original story, but have it take place more inside the fairy realm.

📄 2015_WillOfTheNecromancerBackstory.docx
Old Draft May 9, 2026

2015_WillOfTheNecromancerBackstory

This document proceeds the original Mythos of Aria story, and serves as a transition from the 'Dark Orb' era ideas that the Mythos of Aria is based on. This story details Cole Ashheart trying to steal the divine (Libratum) orb which protects the kingdom. This orb served as the counterpart to the Dark Orb, which Cole Ashheart would go on to posses, and can be seen in some of the mini comic panels. However, no written media ever mentions the dark orb.

📄 2015_WillOfTheNecromancer.docx
Old Draft May 9, 2026

2015_WillOfTheNecromancer

This document precedes the original Mythos of Aria story. The prologue details a shadowy figure venturing into a cathedral and unleashing the spirit of the dead necromancer that laid dormant there. After this prologue, are chapters 1-3 that reflect the same beats as the first three chapters of the Mythos of Aria document, with Alex wanting to become a knight and preparing for his journey, but the later doc contains more worldbuilding. This doc also makes the random emphasis on the dark part of the Kinesgrove forest make more sense, because that's presumably where the necromancer cathedral is located.

📄 2015_RandomStoryIntro.docx
Old Draft May 9, 2026

2015_RandomStoryIntro

This narrative snippit is from the perspective of the regime 2 commander. It is a short internal dialogue before the battle of snow shore, which is a battle briefly mentioned in Crimson Red Steal. This is an unfinished work.

Scanned Note May 9, 2026

MiniComic_DarkOrb_Invasion

I made this comic while in middle school. It shows Cole Asheart invading the kingdom (with a measely two monsters lol), and the hero standing in his way. I don't remember the hero's name.

Scanned Note May 9, 2026

MiniComic_DarkOrb_ColeIntro

This comic was also made while I was in middle school. It shows the hero of the Dark Orb series confronting the big bad villian, Cole Asheart.

Scanned Note May 9, 2026

MiniComic_DarkOrb_Escape

I made this comic in middle school. It shows Cole Asheart breaking out of a temple-like prison. This was back when the series was called Dark Orb.

Scanned Note May 9, 2026

MiniComic_DarkOrb_Imprisonment

I made this comic in middle school. It shows Cole Asheart imprissoned and tells a bit of his backstory back when the series was called: Dark Orb

📄 Crimson Red Steel.docx
Old Draft May 9, 2026

Crimson Red Steel

This is a short story that takes place during the events of the Mythos of Aria. It details the kingdom's corrpution from within and mentions the disapperance of the division 5a knights. It also contains the characters, Princess/Queen Caitlyn, Beroldus, and a shadowy figure near the Princess/Queen that's hinted to be the archmage Cole Asheart.

Scanned Note May 9, 2026

BrynaBlade_Sketch

Original sketch of the Bryna blade. This is what would become Alex's weapon, and is a leftover idea from a series idea I worked on in middle school called 'Dark Orb.' It then became the subject of a partial Mythos of Aria rewrite, 'Duality of the Sword.'

Image May 9, 2026

AntiFairyWeapons_Sketch

Original sketch of Elizabeth's weapon, the Ante Ayeyo. Also the hilt of Alex's Malachite longsword.

What does this mean?

Every entry in this record is cryptographically linked to the previous one using SHA-256. Tampering with any entry invalidates every entry that follows. The hashes shown here are this document's signature: recomputing them from the project's .ledger/ folder and matching them is verification that the history has not been altered.

How to verify

  1. Open the project's .ledger/ folder.
  2. Open ledger.chain.json — its head should match the Chain Head above.
  3. To verify the chain end-to-end, use Provenance's built-in verifier (Ledger tab → Integrity → Verify) or compute SHA-256 of each line against its successor's prefix.
  4. If anything doesn't match, the ledger has been altered after this record was generated.
